_meta.purpose: Single home of every pipeline parameter. Code reads values from here only; no number is duplicated in code or docs.
_meta.splits_note: Calendar-round boundaries on purpose: warmup = all of 2016 (indicator/window warm-up only), train = 2017..2023, OOS = 2024-01-01..2026-04-30 (full months). OOS is read exactly once, at the end of run_asset.

_barrier_note: Asymmetric ATR Triple Barrier from the momentum-direction entry: TP = TB_ATR_TP*ATR14, SL = TB_ATR_SL*ATR14. Reward:risk b = TB_ATR_TP/TB_ATR_SL feeds the generalized Kelly f=clip(lambda*(p-(1-p)/b),0,cap). TB_ATR_TP==TB_ATR_SL reproduces the symmetric v1 label (b=1 => f=2p-1) byte-for-byte.

ENTRY_GATE._note: Meta-labeling PRIMARY filter — a fixed, Train-only, causal (features at t0) rule that keeps only higher-conviction setups so the LSTM secondary is not flooded with noise. (a) trend agreement: the momentum-direction entry must agree in sign with the trend proxy; (b) significant move: |momentum| >= vol_floor_k * realized_volatility_20. enabled=false reproduces the original every-bar candidate set byte-for-byte. Parameters are NOT per-asset tuned (no gate overfitting).

GATE_CALIBRATION._note: Per-asset operating point chosen jointly on Train out-of-fold log-growth: entry threshold theta, Kelly fraction lambda (geometric grid — linear degenerated to the floor), and direction_mode. Ties resolve to the most conservative point (smaller lambda, higher theta, both-sided).

FEATURE_SEARCH._note: S.1-LSTM per-asset feature selection with an OVERFIT GATE. A light FIXED arch scores subsets on ONE common event set/fold partition (superset-eligible) by 'metric' (default oof_log_growth: the best out-of-fold log-growth over the coarse HPO (theta,lambda) grid via run_engine, so features are picked for TRADEABILITY, consistent with the profit-aligned HPO; 'auc_pr' is the ranking-metric fallback). Each fold's score is averaged over eval_seeds independent weight inits, so a subset's score reflects the FEATURES not one lucky seed. A feature is a candidate only if its marginal gain >= min_feature_gain AND it helps in >= min_fold_win_frac of folds (robust edge). Forward selection maximizes a COMPLEXITY-PENALIZED score (mean - complexity_penalty*n_added). A subset is APPLIED only if it beats core by min_gain. max_select caps additions.

HPO._note: D7 selects the LSTM architecture by TRADEABLE Train OOF log-growth (objective below), not AUC-PR, so the searched hyper-parameters serve profit. weight_decay (Adam L2) + num_layers are the regularization/capacity levers that most reduce the Train->OOS gap. hpo_theta_grid/hpo_lambda_grid = the COARSE operating-point grid used to score each trial's OOF tradeability (the FINE point is chosen at D8).
